OBJECTIVE: Achieve production-ready GA status through systematic security remediation and technical debt elimination.

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
✅ Zero Dependabot alerts across all repositories
✅ Zero security vulnerabilities (npm audit clean)
✅ Zero build warnings (dev and prod)
✅ Zero linting/TypeScript errors
✅ All dependencies at latest secure versions
✅ Clean production build < 2min
✅ 100% critical path test coverage

EXECUTION PHASES (12 days):
Phase 1 (Days 1-2): Security - Fix all 253 Dependabot alerts, resolve 5,000+ code scanning issues
Phase 2 (Days 3-4): Dependencies - Upgrade to latest stable, remove unused packages
Phase 3 (Days 5-7): Code Quality - Zero TS/ESLint errors, eliminate tech debt
Phase 4 (Days 8-9): Performance - Optimize builds, reduce bundle size
Phase 5 (Days 10-11): Testing & Docs - All tests passing, documentation complete
Phase 6 (Day 12): Verification - Final QA, production deployment test

APPROACH: Systematic, comprehensive, zero compromises. This is a BLOCKING requirement for GA release.
